name: AI Customer Support & Ticket Intelligence Bot

parameters.jsCode:
// Handle /start, /help, /status, too_short
const ticket = $input.first().json;
const type = ticket.message_type;

const responses = {
  start: 'Welcome to Support Bot, ' + ticket.user_name + '!

Just describe your issue in plain text and I will:
- Classify your request
- Extract key details
- Generate a response
- Route to the right team

Commands:
/help - Show this message
/status - Check system status
/feedback [text] - Leave feedback',
  
  help: 'How to use this bot:

1. Just type your problem or question
2. I will analyze it with AI and respond
3. If needed, a human agent will follow up

Commands:
/status - System status
/feedback [text] - Leave feedback',
  
  status: 'System Status: All systems operational
AI Engine: Online
Response time: under 5 seconds
Queue: 0 pending tickets',
  
  too_short: 'Please describe your issue in more detail so I can help you properly.'
};

const reply = responses[type] || responses.help;

return [{ json: { chat_id: ticket.chat_id, reply: reply, ticket_id: ticket.ticket_id, skip_ai: true } }];

// ================================================================
// STAGE 4: INTERNAL TEAM NOTIFICATION
// Different detail level based on urgency
// ================================================================

const t = $('8. Parse AI Response').first().json;

const sentimentIcon = { angry: 'ANGRY', frustrated: 'UPSET', neutral: 'NEUTRAL', positive: 'HAPPY' };

const internal = [
  'NEW SUPPORT TICKET',
  '',
  'Ticket: ' + t.ticket_id,
  'From: ' + t.user_name + ' (ID: ' + t.user_id + ')',
  'Category: ' + t.category.toUpperCase(),
  'Urgency: ' + (t.urgency || 'medium').toUpperCase(),
  'Sentiment: ' + (t.sentiment || 'neutral'),
  'Priority Score: ' + t.priority_score,
  '',
  'Summary: ' + (t.summary || 'N/A'),
  t.extracted_product ? 'Product: ' + t.extracted_product : '',
  t.extracted_error ? 'Error: ' + t.extracted_error : '',
  '',
  'Customer Message:',
  '"' + t.raw_text.slice(0, 500) + '"',
  '',
  'AI Auto-Reply Sent:',
  '"' + t.auto_reply.slice(0, 300) + '"',
  '',
  'Assigned: ' + t.assigned_team,
  'SLA: ' + t.sla_minutes + ' minutes',
  'Deadline: ' + t.sla_deadline,
  t.requires_human ? '\nHUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED' : '',
  '',
  'Metadata:',
  '  Language: ' + t.language,
  '  Word count: ' + t.word_count,
  '  Has URL: ' + t.has_url,
  '  Has email: ' + t.has_email,
  '  Has phone: ' + t.has_phone
].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

return [{ json: { internal_notification: internal, ticket_id: t.ticket_id } }];

// TICKET LOG — record every interaction
const ticket = $('8. Parse AI Response').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  event: 'ticket_processed',
  ticket_id: ticket.ticket_id,
  category: ticket.category,
  urgency: ticket.urgency,
  sentiment: ticket.sentiment,
  priority_score: ticket.priority_score,
  requires_human: ticket.requires_human,
  assigned_team: ticket.assigned_team,
  sla_minutes: ticket.sla_minutes,
  user_id: ticket.user_id,
  language: ticket.language,
  response_generated: true,
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
}}];
